zh.Eastwell Manor, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特易亞斯特維爾
zh.North Mymms, Hertfordshire, England: 英國賀特福爾諾斯 米姆斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Isabelle Knollys於1386年出生在英國賀特福爾諾斯 米姆斯時，她的父親SIR THOMAS KNOLLES52歲，母親JANE RALEIGH43歲。她於1403年與Sir Thomas Moyle在英國肯特爾哈姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1461年在英國米德萊可倫敦享年75歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.Eastwell Manor, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特易亞斯特維爾
zh-hans.North Mymms, Hertfordshire, England: 英国賀特福爾諾斯 米姆斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Isabelle Knollys于1386年出生在英国賀特福爾諾斯 米姆斯时，她的父亲SIR THOMAS KNOLLES52岁，母亲JANE RALEIGH43岁。她于1403年与Sir Thomas Moyle在英国肯特爾哈姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1461年在英国米德萊可倫敦享年75岁，埋葬在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Knollys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knowles
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English knol(le) ‘knoll, hilltop’ (Old English cnoll) or from any of the many places (some lost) named with this word, for example Knowle (Devon, Dorset, Lancashire, Somerset, Warwickshire, and Yorkshire) and Knole (Kent, Sussex).
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tnúthghail (see Newell ).
English: variant of Noel , often, with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Isabelle Knollys was born in 1386, in North Mymms, Hertfordshire, England, her father, SIR THOMAS KNOLLES, was 52 and her mother, JANE RALEIGH, was 43. She married Sir Thomas Moyle in 1403, in Chilham, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1461, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Isabelle Knollys est née en 1386, à North Mymms, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, SIR THOMAS KNOLLES, avait 52 ans et sa mère, JANE RALEIGH, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Moyle en 1403, à Chilham, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1461, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Isabelle Knollys 1386 in North Mymms, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater SIR THOMAS KNOLLES 52 und ihre Mutter JANE RALEIGH 43. Sie hat 1403 in Chilham, Kent, England Sir Thomas Moyle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1461 im Alter von 75 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Isabelle Knollys è nata il nel 1386 nel North Mymms, Hertfordshire, England, sua padre, SIR THOMAS KNOLLES, aveva 52 anni e sua madre, JANE RALEIGH, aveva 43 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Moyle nel 1403, nel Chilham, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1461, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a London, England.

ja.North Mymms, Hertfordshire, England: イギリスハートフォードシュアイアノース ムインムズ

ja.Reading, Berkshire, England: イギリスバークシュアイアレアディング
ja.lifeSummary: Lady Isabelle Knollysが1386年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアノース ムインムズで生まれた時，父SIR THOMAS KNOLLESは52歳，母JANE RALEIGHは43歳であった。1403年にイギリスケントチルハムでSir Thomas Moyleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1461年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで75歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Isabelle Knollys(이)가 1386년 영국 허트퍼드실르 노르스 마이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 SIR THOMAS KNOLLES(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 JANE RALEIGH(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 1403년 영국 켄트 치함에서 Sir Thomas Moyle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1461년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

mn.Eastwell Manor, Kent, England: Eastwell, Centlond, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Isabelle Knollys nasceu em 1386, em North Mymms, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, SIR THOMAS KNOLLES, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, JANE RALEIGH, tinha 43 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Moyle em 1403, em Chilham, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1461, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Isabelle Knollys родилась в 1386 г. в местности норт миммс, хиртфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени SIR THOMAS KNOLLES было 52 года, а матери, которую звали JANE RALEIGH, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Moyle в 1403 г. в местности чилхам, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1461 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности Лондон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Isabelle Knollys nació en 1386, en North Mymms, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, SIR THOMAS KNOLLES, tenía 52 años y su mamá, JANE RALEIGH, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Moyle en 1403, en Chilham, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1461, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en London, Inglaterra.
